_comment: Authoritative master-set counts — every distinct card needed for a master set: base numbered + ALL reverse holos + secret rares + special holo-pattern variants (Poké Ball / Master Ball / Energy patterns). NO API exposes these (pokemontcg.io has only printed/total; TCGdex reverse is a gappy per-card boolean), so they are curated from collector master-set guides (PokéCottage, cross-checked with Binder Forge / PokéBeach). These OVERRIDE the heuristic, so /sets is always correct and cache-independent. Covers the 4 most-recent eras (Mega Evolution, Scarlet & Violet, Sword & Shield, Sun & Moon) — verified by a multi-agent research sweep 2026-06-24, all high-confidence except svp/sve/pgo/sm1/sm2/sm3 (medium). Older eras fall back to the heuristic and carry an accuracy disclaimer. To add/fix a set: take its Master Set Total from https://pokecottage.com/<set>-master-set-guide. Subset cards (Trainer Gallery, Shiny Vault, Galarian Gallery, Classic Collection) are counted under THEIR OWN set id (e.g. swsh9tg, swsh45sv, sma, cel25c), NOT folded into the parent — matching how pokemontcg.io and the app model them as separate tiles. Keyed by pokemontcg.io set id.
